impact: This gives the daemon deterministic recovery instructions for the current stalled public PDF validation task: shrink retries, require py_compile-safe Python, forbid TypeScript-style fragments in Python expressions, keep supervisor repair separate from domain implementation, and avoid live/downloaded/private DevHub artifacts. It should let validation accept the repair guide and steer the next autonomous cycle away from repeating the same malformed test patch.
summary: Replace the PP&D supervisor repair guide with a narrow syntax-recovery guide that matches the existing repair-guide tests and directly addresses the repeated Python SyntaxError loop.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 13 consecutive daemon rounds failed without an accepted patch

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
